title: Make It Real Work Item Artifact
description: Schema for a Make It Real work item artifact stored under work-items/.

schemaVersion.description: Artifact schema version emitted by the Make It Real planner.

id.description: Stable work item identifier used by boards, DAG nodes, and evidence.

title.description: Human-readable work item title when generated from a board-capable plan.

prdId.description: PRD identifier this work item traces to.

lane.description: Current workflow lane for the work item.

responsibilityUnitId.description: Responsibility unit that owns this work item.

contractIds.description: Contracts implemented or consumed by this work item.

dependencyContracts.description: Declared provider contracts this work item depends on across responsibility boundaries.

dependsOn.description: Work item ids that must complete before this item can run.

allowedPaths.description: File patterns this work item is allowed to modify.

prdTrace.description: Traceability links from this work item back to PRD acceptance criteria.

acceptanceCriteriaIds.description: Acceptance criterion ids covered by this work item.

doneEvidence.description: Evidence files required before this work item can be considered Done.

verificationCommands.description: Structured commands that verify the work item.

verificationExempt.description: Reason a coordination-only work item has no direct verification command.

parentWorkItemId.description: Parent work item id when this item was materialized from recursive decomposition.

contractId.description: Contract identifier consumed by the work item.

providerResponsibilityUnitId.description: Responsibility unit that provides the dependency contract.

surface.description: Provider surface exposed through the dependency contract.

allowedUse.description: Allowed use of the dependency contract.

path.description: Run-relative path to the evidence file.

args.description: Command arguments passed without shell interpolation.
